title: Mighty Spicy Malaysian Almond Flour Bake
description: A crunchy, spicy almond flour bake infused with Malaysian red curry and ginger, perfect for a plant-based snack.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 180°C and line a baking sheet with parchment paper.
In a large bowl whisk together almond flour, baking powder and salt.
Add red curry paste, coconut milk, ginger, chili flakes and oil to the dry mix and stir until a thick batter forms.
Pour the batter onto the prepared baking sheet and spread it into an even layer.
Bake for 20 minutes or until the edges turn golden brown.
Remove from oven and let the bake cool for 5 minutes before slicing into squares.
Serve warm or at room temperature, optionally drizzled with a light lime vinaigrette.
Enjoy the spicy, flaky crunch of this Malaysian-inspired plant-based treat.
